title: Set Up Local Lambda Testing with Container App
description: Set up a local containerized environment for testing Lambda functions without deploying to AWS. This enables faster iteration cycles for development and experimentation by running Lambda functions in a local container app instead of requiring continuous deployment to the AWS Lambda service.
acceptance_criteria: Lambda function runs locally in a container environment
Developer can iterate on code changes without deploying to AWS
Local container accurately simulates the Lambda execution environment
Test results from local execution are consistent with AWS Lambda behavior
implementation_notes: Local container testing setup for Lambda functions to reduce deployment overhead during development.
